note: Coverage floor for the completion-verify dataset — set to the current case count so a deleted case is caught, not just a drop past a slack floor. The runner also requires correct==total (a perfect grader). Raise this in lockstep when you add cases; a drop below it, or any case graded wrong, is a regression and fails CI. An unreadable/malformed baseline fails the run (fail-closed); set min_cases to 0 to run with no floor.
